title: 12pcs Finger Puppets for Toddlers, Finger Puppets, to Tell Animal Stories or Nursery Rhymes, Lifelike and Cute Animal Designs, for Birthday Party Favors Children'S Day Gifts, Classroom Rewards
features: High-Quality Finger Puppets: Our finger puppets are made with high-quality soft plush material, ensuring a supple feel for kids. Carefully handcrafted and sewn to perfection, these finger puppets for toddlers are durable and can be used many times without tearing easily.

Lifelike and Cute Animal Designs: This set of 12 finger puppets includes 12 different kinds of animals, such as rat, ox, tiger, rabbit, dragon, snake, horse, goat, monkey, rooster, dog, and pig. Each animal is so cute and lifelike, making playtime even more enjoyable for children.

Engaging and Educational: Our finger puppets serve as more than just toys. They are also educational tools that help improve oral communication skills and logical thinking skills in children. Use them during storytime to tell animal stories or nursery rhymes, and watch as your child's imagination comes alive.

Versatile Usage: These finger puppets have a wide range of uses. They are perfect as birthday party favors Children's Day gifts, classroom rewards, stocking stuffers, safari party supplies, and even as kids key chains or pinata surprises. Their small size makes them convenient for carrying around and playing with anytime, anywhere.

Fun and Interactive Play: With our hand puppets for kids, your child will experience hours of fun and interactive play. Encourage them to create their own stories and engage in imaginative play with these adorable puppets. Watch as their creativity and storytelling skills flourish while having a great time.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Improving oral communication and logical thinking skills
